rationale: Page 10 is a case-study slide titled 'Bx12 SBS | Features' shown at the Webster Avenue CAC meeting. The block lists Bx12 SBS features—including bus lanes with curbside 7am-7pm lanes, red coloration, overhead signs, and delivery windows—as an example of an existing SBS implementation on Fordham Road. The cited block does not explicitly state these are treatments attached to the Webster Avenue project or any other project/corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▪ New/upgraded bus lanes – Curbside 7am-7pm lanes – Red coloration – Overhead signs for visibility – 'Delivery Windows' in retail core
